steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: This is a Words in Context question. The underlined word "drew" appears in the line "I drew the shades far down, crept into bed." You need the choice that most nearly captures the meaning of "drew" in this specific physical action of lowering window shades before sleep.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Pulled': In the context of lowering window shades, "pulled" captures the physical motion — the speaker pulled the shades downward. This fits perfectly. ✓
  • Choice B — 'Drained': "Drew" can mean drained in the sense of drawing water from a well, but shades are not drained. This meaning does not fit the physical action of closing window shades. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Inspired': "Drew" can mean inspired or elicited a response (e.g., drew applause), but the speaker is performing a physical action on the shades, not inspiring anything. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Sketched': "Drew" can mean sketched or illustrated, but the speaker is not drawing a picture — they are physically lowering the shades. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
